reason: Settled earnings claim flow is exercised by integration tests, but the settled-branch anchor is not attributed reliably under --ir-minimum.
Invalid enum raw-state branch is only meaningful in direct library helper tests.
Direct library wrapper is exercised by unit tests but its function anchor is not attributed reliably under --ir-minimum.
Direct library wrapper is exercised by unit tests but its function anchor is not attributed reliably under --ir-minimum.
Invalid enum raw-state branch is only meaningful in direct library helper tests.
Covered-shortfall buffer path is exercised by direct library tests, but the branch anchor is not attributed reliably under --ir-minimum.
Release-fee clamp is exercised by direct library tests but not mapped reliably under --ir-minimum.
endListing zeroes remaining amount when deactivating a non-sold-out listing, so inactive non-sold-out state cannot persist under valid flows.
Secondary listing-not-found revert is exercised by integration tests but not mapped reliably under --ir-minimum.
Secondary asset-operational guard path is exercised by integration tests but not mapped reliably under --ir-minimum.
buyFromSecondaryListing handles expired listings via early cleanup/return before secondary validation, so this guard is not reached in valid flow.
Release clamp branch requires malformed collateral state under valid protocol semantics.
Invalid collateral amount via enableProceeds(assetId) is exercised in tests, but the defensive duplicate check inside _fundCurrentBuffersFor is not mapped reliably under --ir-minimum.
First-time enableProceeds initialization path is exercised in tests but not mapped reliably under --ir-minimum.
Initialized collateral inside _fundCurrentBuffersFor cannot have lockedAt == 0 through normal flows.
Zero-amount primary redemption is exercised by integration tests, but the early guard is not attributed reliably under --ir-minimum coverage mapping.

Current-epoch redemption supply rolls forward once backed principal is depleted, so valid flows do not leave a redeemable tranche with zero payout; the guard is defensive against inconsistent accounting state.
Collateral deposit clamp requires inconsistent accounting state and is not reachable via valid flows.
Immediate-proceeds release only runs after coverage is established or on malformed state; valid external flows do not reach a zero-release call site.
Zero-elapsed helper branch is not reported reliably under --ir-minimum.
A valid earnings summary cannot have lastProcessedPeriod ahead of the simulated next period; this early return only defends against inconsistent accounting state.
Pending-release preview tests exercise both the processed and unprocessed recorded-period paths, but this helper branch is not attributed reliably under --ir-minimum.
All call sites invoke the recomputation helper only when there are unprocessed periods; the false-path return is a defensive helper guard.
Unprotected liquidation explicitly exercises the zero-benchmark shortfall path, but the early-return branch is not attributed reliably under --ir-minimum.
Coverable-base output is already bounded by protected exposure and immediate-proceeds offsets; exceeding current baseCollateral is only a defensive clamp under malformed state.
Release recomputation is bounded by base collateral, so exceeding total collateral requires malformed state.
Mature voluntary settlement refund path is exercised in tests but not mapped reliably under --ir-minimum.
ERC1155 balance checks prevent transfer position underflow before the internal FIFO walker can leave a positive remainder.
ERC1155 burn balance checks prevent generic revenue-token burns from reaching the FIFO remainder revert under valid external flows.
